evals.prompt: Run plan-work. No goal file was provided. Docs/Goals/ contains several goal files; Docs/Goals/combat/add-parry.md has status: pending and 3 unchecked acceptance criteria (others are either completed or have every checkbox ticked). The project is Unity on branch main.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator spawns an explore agent (Step 0b) that returns GOAL_FILE=Docs/Goals/combat/add-parry.md, GOAL_TITLE='[Combat] Add parry', UNCHECKED_COUNT=3. The orchestrator creates a worktree goal/combat-add-parry at ../.worktrees/combat-add-parry, reads the goal + any Docs/Specs/Combat.md, then runs the 6-step pipeline: plan (Prometheus), momus review, sisyphus implementation in the worktree, hephaestus verification, and doc updates. Final execution summary names all six specialists and reports PASS with per-criterion evidence.
expectations: Step 0b: spawns task(subagent_type='explore', run_in_background=false) with a prompt that instructs 'stop at first match'
Explore prompt explicitly filters status != completed AND at least one unchecked checkbox
Explore return contract uses the exact tokens GOAL_FILE / GOAL_TITLE / PRIORITY / UNCHECKED_COUNT or NO_INCOMPLETE_GOAL
Creates worktree outside the main repo root (../.worktrees/ or similar)
Branch is goal/-prefixed (e.g. goal/combat-add-parry)
Reads Docs/Specs/Combat.md if present and passes it to downstream agents
Step 2: delegates to subagent_type='plan' with full goal text + criteria list + worktree env
Step 3: delegates to subagent_type='momus' with the plan + criteria and expects APPROVE / REQUEST_CHANGES
Step 4: delegates to subagent_type='sisyphus' inside the worktree with the approved plan and three-gate protocol
Step 5: delegates to subagent_type='hephaestus' to re-verify each criterion with independent evidence
Step 6: updates goal file (tick boxes, status=completed), Master.md counts, and delegates spec update
Execution summary includes per-criterion VERIFIED evidence and the PR URL

evals.prompt: Run plan-work. The user provided Docs/Goals/inventory/add-sorting.md as the goal file. It has 4 acceptance criteria, all unchecked, status: pending. Flutter project on branch main.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator skips Step 0b (explore) because the goal file was provided. It creates goal/inventory-add-sorting worktree, runs plan→momus→sisyphus→hephaestus→docs. The delegation skills reflect Flutter domain (flutter-code, flutter-standards for Sisyphus; dart analyze for the Gate 2 check).
expectations: Does NOT spawn the explore agent because a goal file path was provided
Detects Flutter domain (pubspec.yaml, lib/, .dart signals) and passes domain='flutter' to subagents
Sisyphus prompt includes 'dart analyze' as the Gate 2 verification command
Skill selection for Sisyphus includes flutter-code / flutter-standards (not unity skills)
Hephaestus independently re-runs dart analyze and re-reads files to verify criteria
Spec update delegation uses a flutter-appropriate category + skills (not unity-spec for a Flutter project)

evals.prompt: Run plan-work. Docs/Goals/ exists but every goal file is either status: completed OR has all checkboxes already ticked.
evals.expected_output: The explore agent returns NO_INCOMPLETE_GOAL. The orchestrator stops immediately, reports 'No incomplete goals found under Docs/Goals/.', and does NOT create a worktree, does NOT spawn plan/momus/sisyphus/hephaestus, and does NOT invent a goal.
expectations: Orchestrator receives NO_INCOMPLETE_GOAL and halts before Step 1
No git worktree is created
No plan, momus, sisyphus, or hephaestus agent is spawned
No goal file is fabricated or modified
Output contains an explicit 'no incomplete goals' message

evals.prompt: Run plan-work with Docs/Goals/combat/add-parry.md (5 acceptance criteria, 1 in particular: 'Parry window respects ParryConfig.windowMs'). Prometheus produces a plan. Momus replies REQUEST_CHANGES because criterion 3 has no corresponding sub-task and criterion 5 has no verification method listed.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator reads Momus's REQUEST_CHANGES output, does NOT proceed to Sisyphus, and re-invokes the plan agent via the stored plan session_id with Momus's required-changes list. After Prometheus returns a revised plan, Momus re-reviews it. Only after APPROVE does the pipeline move to Sisyphus. If Momus rejects three revisions in a row, the orchestrator consults Oracle instead of looping forever.
expectations: Does NOT spawn Sisyphus while Momus's verdict is REQUEST_CHANGES
Re-dispatches the plan agent with session_id (continuation, not a fresh task)
The follow-up plan prompt includes Momus's specific required-changes bullets
Fresh Momus invocation reviews the revised plan (new task, not session-continued)
After 3 failed revision cycles, Oracle is consulted or the impasse is surfaced — orchestrator does not loop indefinitely

evals.prompt: Run plan-work on Docs/Goals/ui/build-hud.md (3 acceptance criteria). Sisyphus reports STATUS: DONE with an evidence table claiming all three criteria PASS. Hephaestus re-verifies and finds criterion 2 ('HUD hides on pause') has no code changes in the PauseController — it is UNMET. Hephaestus returns OVERALL: FAIL with GAPS: 'Criterion 2 — no handler in PauseController for HUD hide'.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator does NOT mark the goal completed. It leaves criterion task 2 as status='in_progress' with metadata.verification_status='unmet'. It re-dispatches Sisyphus via the stored sisyphus session_id with the Hephaestus GAPS block. After Sisyphus pushes the fix, a FRESH Hephaestus invocation re-verifies. Only when Hephaestus returns PASS with all three VERIFIED does the orchestrator tick the criterion checkboxes, set goal status=completed, and update Master.md.
expectations: Does NOT mark goal completed while Hephaestus returns FAIL
Does NOT tick criterion 2's checkbox while it is UNMET
Re-dispatches Sisyphus with session_id (continuation), passing the specific GAPS list
Runs a FRESH Hephaestus invocation (new task) after Sisyphus reports the fix — Hephaestus is not session-continued across verify rounds
Updates criterion tasks one at a time via task_update (never batch-completes)
Only after all criteria are VERIFIED does the goal file get status=completed and the checkboxes ticked
Retries cap at 3 Sisyphus↔Hephaestus cycles before escalating to Oracle or blocking the goal

evals.prompt: Run plan-work on Docs/Goals/crafting/add-recipes.md. No Docs/Specs/Crafting.md exists. Pipeline completes successfully (Hephaestus PASS). Now the orchestrator runs Step 6.
evals.expected_output: The orchestrator ticks every acceptance-criteria checkbox in the goal file, sets status=completed with a completion date, updates Master.md (row status + recomputed counts), updates README.md only if the change touches user-facing features (otherwise logs 'README: not impacted'), and delegates a Docs/Specs/Crafting.md CREATION (not Update) task in the background. Worktree is cleaned up. The final summary lists per-criterion VERIFIED evidence, PR URL, and the spec update task status.
expectations: Ticks every verified checkbox (- [ ] → - [x]) in the goal file
Sets frontmatter status=completed and adds a completion date
Updates Docs/Goals/Master.md row and recomputes the top-level counts
README update is conditional on user-facing impact — skipped with a log line if not impacted
Spec delegation uses CREATE mode (Feature Spec) because Docs/Specs/Crafting.md does not exist
Spec delegation runs with run_in_background=true (non-blocking) and its task_id is recorded
Worktree is cleaned up after PR is confirmed (goal/crafting-add-recipes worktree removed)
Final summary includes PR URL, per-criterion evidence, and spec update status (DONE or PENDING)
